entryGates: Each beta scope has active content mapped to Knowledge Graph targets.

exitGates: Each cohort reaches the minimum learning event target.

decisions: Keep beta cohorts small while watch items gather more evidence.
Do not use beta data for hard Knowledge Graph changes until real learning KPIs improve.
